title: sambucus mexicana var. velutina
intro: Sambucus mexicana var. velutina, also known as Velvet Elderberry, is a deciduous shrub native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Velvet Elderberry include reducing fever, alleviating cold and flu symptoms, and supporting immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory issues. Velvet Elderberry can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in skincare products due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.
